title: Fabulous Survival
description: A vanilla+ modpack enhancing Minecraft survival with client-side improvements and quality-of-life mods.
body:
Fabulous Survival is a vanilla+ modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft survival experience with client-side improvements. Featuring mods that refine gameplay mechanics, boost exploration, and provide quality of life enhancements, this modpack offers a polished and immersive adventure. Enjoy enhanced graphics, smoother performance, and intuitive interfaces, all while staying true to the essence of Minecraft. Dive into Fabulous Survival and experience a visually stunning and seamless survival journey!

![High Render Distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150803a60056135e47b102b412fd7b0854594d5b.png)
You get high FPS on high renderdistance

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Note: I did not create any of these mods. Full credit goes to the mod developers. If you want your mod to be removed, or for any issues/errors, please join the Discord.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
